titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Radley H. Daly, Deputy Secretary, Yale University, Records
Daly (Radley H), Deputy Secretary, Yale University, Records
titlestmt.author: compiled by Daniel Hartwig

controlnote.p: This encoded finding aid is compliant with the Yale EAD Best Practice Guidelines, Version 1.0.

descriptivenote.p: Finding aid description and metadata in Archives at Yale are licensed under a CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. This means that anyone may copy, modify, and distribute this descriptive metadata without restriction or permission. The CC0 license is explained in full on the Creative Commons website: CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. More information is available on our Help page.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Thursday November 6, 2025 at 03:12

did.unittitle: Radley H. Daly, deputy secretary, Yale University, records
did.abstract: The records consist of subject files created and maintained by Radley H. Daly as associate secretary (1986-1992) and deputy secretary and marshall of Yale University (1992-1996). The records document labor relations, committees, prizes and lectureships, special events and visitations by distinguished individuals, and Yale historical activities. Also included are Daly's files concerning the Yale Sailing Associates, 1972-1980.

corpname.part: Yale University. Office of the Secretary

odd.head: General note
odd.p: Forms part of Yale Record Group 4-B (YRG 4-B), Records of Yale deputy, associate, and assistant secretaries.

acqinfo.head: Immediate Source of Acquisition
acqinfo.p: The records were transferred from the Office of the Secretary, 1989-2004.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Access to the records is restricted until January 1, 2035.
Some records in this finding aid have been redacted, as they include student names, donor names, and other restricted data. These records will not appear in the published finding aid.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Radley H. Daly, Deputy Secretary, Yale University, Records (RU 113). Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: The records are arranged by accession.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The records consist of subject files created and maintained by Radley H. Daly as associate secretary (1986-1992) and deputy secretary and marshall of Yale University (1992-1996). The records document labor relations, committees, prizes and lectureships, special events and visitations by distinguished individuals, and Yale historical activities. Also included are Daly's files concerning the Yale Sailing Associates, 1972-1980.

corpname.part: Yale University. Office of the Secretary

did.unittitle: Y-1 Association Internationale des Etudiants en Sciences Economiques et Commerciales (AIESEC)
Thank You Letters to New Members
Letter to Clerical and Technical Staff and Service and Maintenance Staff
Planning: Outline, Funding, Budgets, Opening Report, Letters, Invitations, Programs
Specifications and Installation, Site Selection, Exhibition Bookstore
Books: 2 Copies of Anne Frank in the World: 1929-1945

Records of Radley Daly as deputy secretary
